patch_actions.label: Load 加载素材
patch_actions.description: Replace a target asset with a file from the content pack.

field_hints.FromFile: File path inside the content pack, usually under assets/.

patch_actions.label: EditData 编辑数据
patch_actions.description: Change data assets with Entries, Fields, MoveEntries, or TextOperations.

field_hints.Entries: Add or replace entries by key.
field_hints.TextOperations: Apply text edits for string data.

patch_actions.label: EditImage 编辑图片
patch_actions.description: Patch an image asset from a source image file.

field_hints.PatchMode: Overlay by default; Replace should be used when overwriting a full area.

patch_actions.label: EditMap 编辑地图
patch_actions.description: Patch a map asset with a map file or map operations.

patch_actions.label: Include 引入补丁
patch_actions.description: Include patches from another content file.

tokens.name: ModId
tokens.description: The current content pack unique ID.

tokens.name: HasMod
tokens.description: Whether a mod with the given unique ID is installed.

tokens.name: i18n
tokens.description: Translation token, usually {{i18n:key}} or with arguments.

tokens.name: Target
tokens.description: Patch target token available in some patch contexts.

tokens.name: FromFile
tokens.description: Patch source file token available in some patch contexts.

notes: Use stable translation keys instead of hard-coded user-facing text where practical.
Keep default.json complete; locale files can override individual keys.
Translation tokens may be used in content.json fields where token strings are supported.

text_operations.description: Content Patcher TextOperations edit delimited or matched text inside data strings.

operations.description: Append text to an existing value.
Prepend text to an existing value.
Replace a delimited field within a string.
Remove a delimited field from a string.

guidance: Use TextOperations for string formats where replacing the whole entry would conflict with other mods.
Gift tastes and other slash-delimited legacy strings often benefit from delimiter-aware operations.

trigger_actions.description: Trigger actions can be defined in game data and invoked by supported game systems or trigger hooks.
content_patcher_guidance: Prefer stable unique IDs for custom trigger actions.
Use Content Patcher conditions to gate patches which add trigger actions.
When adding trigger actions through EditData, target Data/TriggerActions.

ai_guidance: Always output valid JSON only when asked for a JSON fragment.
Use Content Patcher field names exactly as documented, including Action, Target, FromFile, When, Entries, Fields, and Include.
Prefer common tokens and conditions from the rule library; if unsure, explain uncertainty briefly outside JSON only when the user asked for prose.
For user-facing text, prefer i18n keys when the project already uses translations.
For legacy slash-delimited data strings, consider TextOperations instead of replacing entire entries.
